creator: foo@meisterderspiele.de
text:
Hello,

after 2 months this little update is not committed yet. Can i do 
something to help you?

Thanks for your work and a happy new year!
Torsten

On 04.11.2013 12:40, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/183657'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
